` --- 🎨 styles.css `css body { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; margin: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f2027, #203a43, #2c5364); color: #fff; overflow-x: hidden; } .hero { text-align: center; padding: 100px 20px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .cta { display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #00c6ff; color: #fff; border-radius: 30px; text-decoration: none; transition: 0.3s; } .cta:hover { background: #0072ff; } .cards { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 20px; padding: 60px 20px; } .card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 15px; padding: 30px; width: 300px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .card:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); }
